ctx = Context(store_id='store-acme', catalog_id='catalog-acme-electronics', currency_code='USD', culture_name='en-US', user_name='Anonymous', user_id='6afa3cfe-9a35-4137-a4b5-c48e8e255d13', contact_id=None, organization_id=None)

    @pytest.mark.graphql
    @allure.feature("Cart / Items (GraphQL)")
    @allure.title("Add multiple items to cart via bulk mutation")
    def test_cart_add_bulk_items(
        request: pytest.FixtureRequest, cart_ops: CartOperations, ctx: Context
    ) -> None:
        with allure.step("Bulk-add two items to cart"):
            response = cart_ops.add_bulk_items_to_cart(
                store_id=ctx.store_id,
                user_id=ctx.user_id,
                culture_name=ctx.culture_name,
                currency_code=ctx.currency_code,
                items=[
                    CartBulkItemInput(product_sku=_PRODUCT_1_ID, quantity=_QUANTITY_1),
                    CartBulkItemInput(product_sku=_PRODUCT_2_ID, quantity=_QUANTITY_2),
                ],
            )
    
        with allure.step("Verify no bulk errors"):
            assert not response.errors, (
                f"Bulk mutation returned errors: "
                f"{[e.model_dump(exclude_none=True) for e in response.errors]}"
            )
    
        with allure.step("Verify bulk response contains a cart"):
            assert response.cart is not None, "Bulk mutation returned no cart"
            cart = response.cart
    
        @allure.step("Teardown: delete cart")
        def _delete_cart() -> None:
            cart_ops.delete_cart(cart_id=cart.id, user_id=ctx.user_id)
    
        request.addfinalizer(_delete_cart)
    
        with allure.step("Verify both line items present with correct quantities"):
